cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out this ethical dilemma about graffiti on private property. Let me start by understanding the problem. The person is an artist who uses graffiti as a form of expression. Their latest work is beautiful and meaningful, but it's on private property without the owner's permission. The question is whether to leave it there, asserting their freedom of expression, or remove it, respecting the property rights of the owner.
